subject: Change init-containers from annotations to spec
commit_message:
Change init-containers from annotations to spec

Removing init-containers in the deployment specifications from
the old annotations to spec for all components

Issue-ID: OOM-406

Change-Id: Idae2289f7609b2df813eac024aec9fbea5e57e42
Signed-off-by: kiranya <kiran.yadav@amdocs.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

Hi, thanks for the change. Can you explain the rational in the commit message? (Support newer version a k8s). Also, this will bring backward incompatibility to older versions. This needs to be well advertised before we can move forward. Thanks

Patch Set 1:

reviewing now - just an fyi, may want to split the change into subtasks

Patch Set 1:

Also keep in mind module owners - log for example

Patch Set 1:

Verify env testing -  Rancher 1.6.10, Helm 2.3

Patch Set 1:

Post some test results to the Jira - thanks

Patch Set 1:

Could split out new components - aaf, clamp, vnfsdk

Patch Set 1:

vfc is not here - but you can push this out to another jira as well (it is still a WIP)

Patch Set 1:

> vfc is not here - but you can push this out to another jira as well
 > (it is still a WIP)

We didn't find any init-container annotation in vfc, that is why it is not here.

Patch Set 1:

> Verify env testing -  Rancher 1.6.10, Helm 2.3

For Helm 2.3 createAll.bash script ends up into error:
Error: parse error in "log/templates/kibana-deployment.yaml": template: log/templates/kibana-deployment.yaml:61: function "tpl" not defined
The command helm returned with error code 1

tpl will supposedly work with helm 2.5+ as the script was working properly with Helm 2.7

Patch Set 1:

Kiran - yes that template function requires helm 2.6+  however we are not upgrading to helm yet until we test it and provide an upgrade path for RAncher 1.6.11/helm2.6 to helm2.7.2 client/server

Patch Set 1:

for now stick with 1.6.10:stable rancher and helm 2.3.0 client/server
